name: Grilled Mustard Turkey
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Turkey breast cutlet (1/4 inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat broiler.
2. Coat broiler pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Rinse turkey and pat dry.
4. Mix together mustard, mayonnaise, and lemon juice in a small bowl.
5. Coat one side of the turkey with half of the mustard mixture.
6. Broil about 4 inches from heat source for 5 minutes.
7. Turn and coat the other side of the turkey with mustard mixture and sprinkle with pepper and paprika.
8. Broil for an additional minute or until the top is browned.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley.
10. Serve with Rutabaga Puree (optional) and a Salad.
